title: Windows Shadow Copy Deletion
description: Detects deletion of volume shadow copies via vssadmin or wmic, a common ransomware indicator to prevent recovery from encrypted files.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*vssadmin.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*delete shadows*' or 'Command Line' like '*Delete Shadows*')) or ('Process Name' like '*wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*shadowcopy delete*'))
